channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: github /copilot-sdk | Java | N/A
item.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: jwasham /coding-interview-university | N/A | N/A
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: aquasecurity /trivy | Go | N/A
item.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

item.title: openclaw /openclaw-windows-node | C# | N/A
item.description: Windows companion suite for OpenClaw - System Tray app, Shared library, Node, and PowerToys Command Palette extension

item.title: MemPalace /mempalace | Python | N/A
item.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

item.title: PaddlePaddle /PaddleOCR | Python | N/A
item.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: 666ghj /MiroFish | Python | N/A
item.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

item.title: NVIDIA /cosmos | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.

item.title: Panniantong /Agent-Reach | Python | N/A
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: affaan-m /ECC | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: lfnovo /open-notebook | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

item.title: CopilotKit /CopilotKit | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

item.title: chopratejas /headroom | Python | N/A
item.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you
